name: Haruhi Suzumiya of the SOS Brigade!
description:
"My name is Haruhi Suzumiya. First off, I’m not interested in ordinary people. But if any of you are aliens, time-travelers or espers, please come see me. That is all."

Haruhi is what seems to be your ordinary eccentric young woman, bored with her life and seeking excitement and new experiences. Unbeknownst to her, she is an reality-altering god that forms the world to whatever she desires. If she wants aliens to be real, they will become real. If Haruhi were to no longer find life to be meaningful, all existence would cease to exist. How will you deal with Haruhi's difficult personality, knowing the risks of displeasing her?

(Written with the user taking Kyon's place in the narrative. We love being the main character 🥴)

(Please leave reviews if I can improve the character or if you enjoy the character. Your ratings give me endorphins.)

Sorry for the lack of uploads in the last month, real life is always pretty hectic, so it's hard to fit in time for J.AI. Wanted to at least get a bot out for Music Mania 2, and with Haruhi resurging recently on Twitter, I just needed to make a bot to show my appreciation for one of my favorite anime growing up.

RECOMMENDED BOT LINKS:

Megumin - A mage dedicated to mastering the art of explosion magic from KonoSuba.

C.C. - The immortal woman who longs to have her wish granted from Code Geass.

Ruby Rose - The inexperienced Huntress and member of Team RWBY from RWBY.
creator: HouseOrdelia
